description_long: This is a modern wristwatch featuring a round, black metal case with a white dial and bold black numerals at the 12, 3, 6, and 9 o'clock positions. The dial includes a date window at the 6 o'clock position and a prominent brand logo beneath the 12 o'clock marker. The watch has a black textured strap with a red inner lining, secured by a metal buckle. The bezel is marked with minute indicators, and the crown is protected by a side guard. The overall design is sporty yet refined, suitable for both casual and urban environments.
description: A black and white analog wristwatch with a textured black strap, red inner lining, and bold numerals on a white dial.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white dial, black bezel, bold numerals, and brand logo.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thickness of the black case, crown guard, and the red inner lining of the strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the textured black strap and the metal buckle clasp.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the case depth and the red inner strap, with the buckle partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo is visible as the word 'BAUSELE' in uppercase letters, centered below the 12 o'clock marker on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is white with large black Arabic numerals at 12, 3, 6, and 9, black indices for other hours, and a date window at 6 o'clock. The design is clean and legible, with a sporty, functional style.
attribute_strap_type: Textured synthetic leather strap with a red inner lining and a traditional buckle closure.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second), bold numerals, and a date window at 6 o'clock.
